hero.headline: Tanzania: The Endless Plains
hero.subHeadline: The Great Migration doesn't stop at the border. Mapping the private Grumeti for 2026.

theNyotaLens.architectNote: Our expansion into Tanzania focuses on the 'Grumeti Protocol'—350,000 acres of private wilderness where the migration is yours alone. No crowds, just the raw pulse of the Serengeti.

sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: Witnessing the Western Corridor crossings away from the transit vehicles. A private audience with the greatest show on earth.

sensoryChapters.chapterTitle: Chapter II: The Short Grass Plains
sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: The Ndutu calving season—where half a million wildebeest are born in a single month. A study in the fragility and force of life.
Waking on the edge of Ngorongoro. A garden of Eden enclosed in a volcanic caldera, curated for the modern explorer.

pairsWellWith.reasoning: The logical cross-border extension. The Mara and Serengeti are two halves of the same heartbeat.
